detail: Independent review will cover Chinese-English fidelity, academic English, technical consistency, and LaTeX/template correctness.
Final log check found no undefined references/citations and no fatal errors. pdftotext found no Chinese text or template sample residue in the generated PDF.
Earlier review found normal-column figures sized to textwidth, dense tables wider than column width, and a CJA placeholder running header. All were fixed before final verification.

Terminology risk in translating 突防/规避 as stealth was fixed to maneuvering penetration, evasion, or concealment according to context. No blocking formula, numerical, or reference inconsistency remained.

Final review checks passed for compilation, references, citations, PDF text residue, and figure-language issues. Remaining author-confirmation items are limited to missing front-matter metadata and visual inspection of long-equation layout.
